infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Property Pulse uses the camera to capture in-person photos of homes you visit.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Property Pulse can read your photo library when you choose existing photos for visit notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Property Pulse saves visit photos you take to your photo library when you choose Save to Photos.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Property Pulse uses your contacts to pick phone numbers when you send text message invites to join the app.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Property Pulse to access your photos when you pick images for property visits.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Property Pulse to save visit photos you capture to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Property Pulse to use the camera for in-person property visit photos.

plugins.locationPermission: Property Pulse uses your location to show where you are on the map and nearby homes.
